services_section.label: Our Services

donna.title: Luxury Women's Hairdresser
donna.short: Modern and classic cuts, personalized colors and tailored treatments for luminous and perfectly styled hair.
donna.intro: Our salon offers luxury women's hairdressing services in Monte-Carlo, with modern and classic cuts, personalized colors and tailored treatments. Every client receives a professional consultation, high-quality products and advanced techniques for luminous, healthy and perfectly styled hair.
donna.why_text: Ideal for those seeking an elegant, exclusive and personalized service in Monte-Carlo. Each treatment is designed to enhance the client's natural beauty while respecting the structure and health of the hair.
donna.experience_text: At Barra Giuseppe salon, every woman is welcomed in an elegant and discreet environment. Our philosophy is simple: listen, advise and enhance, with selected products and cutting-edge techniques.

uomo.title: Luxury Men's Hairdresser
uomo.short: Classic and modern cuts, shaving and professional styling for a refined and elegant look.
uomo.intro: We offer men's hairdressing services in Monte-Carlo, with classic and modern cuts, shaving and professional styling. Each treatment is personalized to ensure a refined, elegant look suited to the lifestyle of our international clientele.
uomo.why_text: Perfect for those who desire a premium, quick and high-quality service. Our team ensures precision, style and attention to detail for every client.
uomo.experience_text: Barra Giuseppe salon is the reference for men seeking a flawless look in Monte-Carlo. Classic techniques meet modern trends for an always elegant result.

bambini.title: Children's Hairdresser
bambini.short: Gentle, quick and fun haircuts in a safe and welcoming environment for the little ones.
bambini.intro: A service dedicated to the little ones, with gentle, quick and fun haircuts in a safe and welcoming environment. Each child receives personalized attention for a positive and comfortable experience.
bambini.why_text: Perfect for families looking for a luxury children's hairdresser in Monte-Carlo. Our team is specialized in making every haircut a pleasant and peaceful moment.
bambini.h2_experience: Positive Experience for the Whole Family
bambini.experience_text: At Barra Giuseppe salon, children are welcomed with smiles and patience. A service designed to make every visit a special moment.

barbiere.title: Barber Monte-Carlo
barbiere.short: Men's haircut, beard, shaving and professional styling for a flawless and refined look.
barbiere.intro: Our barber service in Monte-Carlo combines tradition and innovation. Haircut, beard and shaving executed with precision and high-quality products.
barbiere.h2_why: The Art of Barbering in Monte-Carlo
barbiere.why_text: For the man seeking a premium grooming experience, our barber offers classic services elevated to the luxury standard of Monte-Carlo.
barbiere.list_2: Beard and mustache – sculpting and definition
barbiere.experience_text: Barra Giuseppe barber offers a refined experience where tradition and modernity blend to create the perfect look.

balayage.title: Luxury Balayage
balayage.short: Natural, elegant and personalized highlights for a luminous and long-lasting color.
balayage.intro: Luxury balayage in Monte-Carlo is an exclusive service designed for those who desire a refined, luminous and perfectly harmonious color. At Barra Giuseppe salon, balayage is not a standard treatment but a tailored craft designed to enhance the face, complexion and hair structure.
balayage.what_text: Luxury balayage is the evolution of traditional balayage: an advanced technique that creates natural, elegant highlights without harsh lines. Unlike classic colors, the result is luminous, three-dimensional and long-lasting, ideal for those seeking a sophisticated style typical of Monte-Carlo.
balayage.personalized_text: Each balayage is performed after a thorough consultation. We analyze:
balayage.personalized_after: This allows us to create a personalized luxury balayage that is elegant and always in harmony with your image.
balayage.h2_types: Luxury Balayage for Every Hair Type
balayage.types_text: Luxury balayage is suitable for blonde, brown or dark hair, straight, wavy or curly, natural or already colored. The technique is adapted to respect the hair structure and achieve a harmonious and natural result.
balayage.combo_text: For a flawless result, luxury balayage can be combined with:
balayage.international_text: Our salon welcomes local and international clients seeking a luxury balayage in Monte-Carlo in an elegant, discreet and professional environment. We offer personalized consultations and a tailored service, in line with the standards of excellence of Monaco's clientele.

extension.title: Great Lengths Extensions
extension.short: Light, invisible and natural ultrasonic extensions for perfect length and volume.
extension.h1: Luxury Great Lengths Extensions in Monte-Carlo
extension.intro: We apply Great Lengths ultrasonic extensions, light, invisible and natural, ideal for increasing hair length and volume. Each treatment is personalized based on hair type, color and style preferences, ensuring maximum naturalness, comfort and durability.
extension.why_text: Perfect for those who desire a luxury and tailored service in Monte-Carlo. Great Lengths extensions are made with 100% natural, highest quality hair.
extension.experience_text: At Barra Giuseppe salon, extensions are an art. Every application is designed to blend perfectly with natural hair, creating a flawless and long-lasting result.

cheratina.title: Bio Keratin Straightening
cheratina.short: Smooth, silky and healthy hair with bio keratin that nourishes and tames while respecting hair health.
cheratina.h1: Luxury Bio Keratin Straightening in Monte-Carlo
cheratina.intro: Our luxury bio keratin straightening in Monte-Carlo nourishes and tames hair while respecting its health. It reduces frizz, improves shine and softness, ensuring a natural and long-lasting straightening, even during summer months.
cheratina.why_text: Ideal for clients seeking a luxury, safe and long-lasting treatment in Monte-Carlo. Our bio formula respects the hair structure while nourishing it deeply.
cheratina.experience_text: Barra Giuseppe's bio keratin transforms hair making it silky, luminous and easy to manage. A luxury treatment that respects hair health.

estetista.title: Luxury Aesthetician
estetista.short: Hair removal, facial and body treatments, personalized manicure and pedicure for visible results.
estetista.intro: We offer professional aesthetic services in Monte-Carlo, including hair removal, facial and body treatments, manicure and pedicure. Each treatment is personalized to ensure visible results, comfort and luxury.
estetista.why_text: Perfect for those who desire a complete and refined beauty experience. Our team of professional aestheticians uses high-quality products and advanced techniques.
estetista.experience_text: Barra Giuseppe's aesthetician offers a unique beauty experience, where every treatment is a moment of pure relaxation and self-care.

massaggi.title: Luxury Massages
massaggi.short: Professional and personalized massages to relax body and mind in an exclusive setting.
massaggi.intro: Professional and personalized massage services to relax body and mind. Ideal for those seeking luxury wellness experiences in Monte-Carlo, with exclusive treatments for stress, muscle tension or simply relaxation.
massaggi.why_text: Each massage is tailored to the client's individual needs. We use professional techniques and high-quality products to ensure relaxation and lasting benefits.
massaggi.h2_experience: Relaxation in the Heart of Monte-Carlo
massaggi.experience_text: Barra Giuseppe's luxury massages offer an oasis of tranquility in the heart of Monte-Carlo. An experience that rejuvenates body and mind.

trucco.title: Professional Event Makeup
trucco.short: Elegant and long-lasting makeup for galas, yachts and summer parties with waterproof products.
trucco.intro: Our professional event makeup in Monte-Carlo guarantees an elegant and long-lasting result, ideal for galas, yachts and summer parties. Waterproof products and advanced techniques ensure a luminous, sophisticated look resistant to heat, sun and humidity, perfect for luxury events and exclusive settings.
trucco.why_text: Barra Giuseppe's professional makeup is designed to withstand the most demanding conditions: from Mediterranean sun to yacht evenings. Flawless results from morning to night.
trucco.list_4: Waterproof makeup for yachts and summer events
trucco.experience_text: Whether it's an exclusive gala, a wedding or a yacht evening, Barra Giuseppe's makeup ensures a flawless and sophisticated look.

about.label: About
about.title: The Art of Beauty in Monte-Carlo
about.p1: Giuseppe Barra is a master craftsman in the art of grooming and beauty, bringing years of refined expertise to the prestigious Principality of Monaco.
about.p2: Trained in the finest techniques of traditional and modern barbering, Giuseppe combines timeless craftsmanship with contemporary trends to create elegant, unique and personalized looks.
about.p3: Each client receives personalized attention in a luxurious setting designed for relaxation and transformation.
